---
title: "MCnebula2 workflow for LC-MS/MS dataset analysis"
bibliography: '`r system.file("extdata", "library.bib", package = "MCnebulaMet")`'
csl: '`r system.file("extdata", "vancouver.csl", package = "MCnebulaMet")`'
reference-section-title: "Reference"
link-citations: true
params:
  quant: NULL
  sample_info: NULL
header-includes:
  - \usepackage[table]{xcolor}
  - \usepackage{float}
output:
  bookdown::pdf_document2:
    keep_tex: true
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    latex_engine: xelatex
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
quant <- params$quant
sample_info <- params$sample_info
```

\newpage

# Sample infomation

```{r}
kableExtra::kable(
  as.data.frame(sample_info),
  format = "latex",
  booktabs = TRUE,
  caption = "Sample information"
) |>
  kableExtra::kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("HOLD_position", "striped"),
    full_width = FALSE
  )
```

# Missing value

```{r}
df_mv <- detect_mv(quant, sample_info)
draw_mv(df_mv)
```

# RSD

```{r RSD}
rsd_res <- compute_rsd(quant)
draw_rsd_scat(rsd_res$rsd_df)
draw_rsd_cumu(rsd_res$cum_df)
if(any(rsd_res$violin_df$type == "QC")){
  draw_rsd_violin(rsd_res$violin_df)
}
```

# intensity

```{r intensity}
intensity_df_longer <- tidyr::pivot_longer(
  quant, cols = dplyr::everything(),
  names_to = "sample", values_to = "intensity"
)
intensity_box_df <- dplyr::left_join(intensity_df_longer, sample_info, by = "sample")
draw_intentity(intensity_box_df)
```

# correlation

```{r correlation}
draw_corr(quant, sample_info)
```

# PCA

```{r PCA}
draw_pca(quant, sample_info, label = TRUE)
```
